title: system.scraper_circuit_open (v1)
description: Published by the Ingestion Service when the circuit breaker threshold is breached for a retailer. Affected scan jobs are suspended; users are notified. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.2.2, 5.2.3.

retailer.description: The retailer whose scraper circuit has opened.

failure_rate.description: Observed failure rate that triggered the circuit open (0.0–1.0).

threshold_breached_at.description: Timestamp when the failure threshold was breached.

affected_scan_job_count.description: Number of user scan jobs suspended by this circuit event.

recovery_probe_interval_minutes.description: Minutes until the next recovery probe attempt.
